personal.name: Sawan Kumar
personal.headline: Software Engineer with 11+ years building scalable, high-performance consumer applications
personal.tagline: Deep expertise in mobile engineering with a focus on Apple platforms. Specialized in system architecture, production stability, modular design, and performance optimization. Passionate about solving complex technical challenges that require elegant engineering solutions at scale.

availability.text: Seeking Principal/Staff iOS roles building secure, high-scale consumer applications where architecture, performance, and production stability are critical

stats.downloadsDescription: Key Products: Norton VPN • Avast SecureLine VPN • HMA VPN • Pluang • INDMoney

techStack.title: Technical Expertise
techStack.description: 11+ years mastering iOS platform engineering—from native frameworks to system architecture, performance optimization to production reliability.

description: Drove cross-functional stability initiative, reduced 100+ high-priority bugs to fewer than 5 within 2 months
Provided technical leadership for end-to-end delivery of high-impact iOS features across Norton VPN, Avast SecureLine VPN, and HMA VPN
Delivered production stability and performance improvements for large-scale VPN applications
Identified and resolved system-level bottlenecks affecting app performance, networking reliability, and production stability
Improved engineering delivery velocity by 50% through workflow optimization and technical process improvements
Reduced release cycle time by 30% through CI/CD pipeline optimization and release engineering improvements
Reduced post-release bugs by 30% through systematic quality improvements and engineering best practices
Architected scalable micro app-based mobile platform, improving development velocity by 40%
Implemented Server-Driven UI architecture, reduced development costs and saved $100K annually
Increased user engagement by 25% through performance optimizations and rapid feature delivery
Built modular architecture enabling parallel team development
Developed Smartivity Magico iOS app using Core ML, Vision, OpenCV, and image-processing pipelines, achieving 95% object recognition accuracy
Built educational app merging machine learning with augmented reality for interactive learning experiences
Built and launched Mobi-Hub marketplace app, leading to 50% increase in user engagement
Delivered end-to-end iOS application from concept to App Store through innovative UI/UX optimizations
Designed and developed Xperia travel app leveraging location-based services, increased user engagement by 40% and achieved 30% growth in active users
Early career foundation in native iOS development and user-centric design

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Production iOS apps serving millions across security, fintech, health, and education. Real-world impact through technical excellence and elegant engineering solutions.

items.title: Norton VPN
items.description: Top-performing VPN with advanced privacy protections and parental controls. Location changing across 28 countries with automatic connection on public networks. Ad tracker blocking and no-log policy verified by third-party audit. Bank-grade encryption with global high-speed servers and dynamic scaling. Providing technical leadership for end-to-end delivery of high-impact iOS features.

items.title: Avast SecureLine VPN
items.description: Fast and simple VPN for iPhone to stay safer and more private when accessing your favorite apps and websites. One-button activation with access to 100+ servers worldwide. Automatic reconnection when switching between data and Wi-Fi with encryption on public networks. Enhanced VPN connection lifecycle across unstable networks, improving reliability and user experience at scale.

items.title: Pluang
items.description: All-in-one investment platform serving 13 million investors with 650+ US Stocks, 620+ Crypto Assets, and 950+ Indonesian Stocks. Features Aura AI—Indonesia's first AI assistant for market analysis. Zero transaction fees with segregated account system and custodian bank protection. Led engineering team to accelerate delivery pipeline 50% while cutting release cycles 30% and production bugs 30%.

items.title: INDmoney
items.description: Investment platform for NRIs with 5000+ stocks and 1500+ mutual funds. FREE demat account with ₹0 maintenance charges. Real-time portfolio tracking with P&L calendar, dividend tracking, and sectoral allocation analysis. Architected micro-app architecture enabling 40% faster feature delivery and Server-Driven UI that eliminated $100K/year in maintenance costs.

items.title: Sharecare
items.description: Health and wellness app with personalized RealAge assessment comparing biological age to calendar age. Daily health metrics tracking including steps, weight, sleep, stress, and blood pressure. Secure centralized storage for health records, lab results, and medications. Doctor finder tool and symptom checker with Apple Health integration.

items.title: Smartivity Magico
items.description: Free companion app transforming smartphones into educational devices through augmented reality and computer vision. Teaches basics of Maths, Spellings, and Shapes through engaging games. AI-driven learning interface with number recognition, letter recognition, and shape identification. Built ML-powered educational app achieving 95% object recognition accuracy using CoreML and Vision.

items.title: Spell English
items.description: Companion app for Kidzee Imagenie physical learning set using blended learning with LSRW methodology. Features letter recognition, phonics, word formation, and sentence completion. Age-specific modules for Play Group through Senior KG with experiential learning and audio-visual interactivity. Developed immersive educational experience enhancing literacy, cognitive, and motor skills.

competencies.label: ML & Vision
competencies.value: Core ML, Vision, OpenCV, Core Image

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Open to discussing iOS opportunities, technical architecture challenges, or collaboration on high-impact mobile projects. Whether you're building the next generation of secure consumer apps or tackling complex platform engineering problems—let's talk.
